sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂכל שׂכל

Transliteration: śekel śêkel

Phonetic: seh'-kel

BDB Definition:

  1. prudence, insight, understanding
    1. prudence, good sense
    2. insight, understanding
    3. cunning, craft (bad sense)

Origin: from H7919

TWOT entry: 2263a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
